texto: That’s the thing about being youngwe are textbook pagesof trial and errorfalling down and getting upnot by way of standing andbrushing off our jeansbuy by laying where we felluntil we were high enough to forget
explicacao: Citação de Kalyn Roseanne Livernois sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “That’s the thing about being youngwe are textbook pagesof trial and errorfalling down and getting…” articula reflexao, growing-up, thing em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
